      <td> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">Amount reflects the number of awards&#xa0;that&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> may&#xa0;</em>ultimately be earned based on management&#x2019;s probability assessment of the achievement of performance conditions at each reporting period.</p> </td>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The intrinsic&#xa0;value related to vested RSUs was $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483188" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsAggregateIntrinsicValueVested" scale="6">138.3</ix:nonFraction> million, $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483189" contextRef="d_2018-01-01_2018-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-7" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsAggregateIntrinsicValueVested" scale="6">90.0</ix:nonFraction> million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483190" contextRef="d_2017-01-01_2017-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-6" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsAggregateIntrinsicValueVested" scale="6">74.0</ix:nonFraction> million for the years ended <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> respectively. As of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em>the total intrinsic value of all outstanding&#xa0;RSUs was $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483193" contextRef="i_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsAggregateIntrinsicValueOutstanding" scale="6">679.5</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, based on the closing stock price of $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483194" contextRef="i_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0">178.02</ix:nonFraction>. As of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em>unamortized compensation expense related to&#xa0;all outstanding RSUs was $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483195" contextRef="i_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:EmployeeServiceShareBasedCompensationNonvestedAwardsTotalCompensationCostNotYetRecognized" scale="6">100.1</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million with a weighted-average remaining recognition period of approximately <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483196">three</span>&#xa0;years.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">Cash proceeds from vested PSUs with a purchase price totaled&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483197" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromIssuanceOfSharesUnderIncentiveAndShareBasedCompensationPlans" scale="6">16.6</ix:nonFraction> million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483198" contextRef="d_2018-01-01_2018-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-RestrictedStockUnitsRSUMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromIssuanceOfSharesUnderIncentiveAndShareBasedCompensationPlans" scale="6">10.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million for the&#xa0;years ended&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019 </em>and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em> respectively.&#xa0;There were&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483200">no</span>&#xa0;proceeds for the&#xa0;year ended <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2017.</em></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>&#xa0;</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>Time-Based RSUs</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">For the years ended <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> the Compensation Committee granted <ix:nonFraction id="c56483203" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-TimebasedRSUsMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">52,000</ix:nonFraction>, <ix:nonFraction id="c56483204" contextRef="d_2018-01-01_2018-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-TimebasedRSUsMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">133,000</ix:nonFraction>, and <ix:nonFraction id="c56483205" contextRef="d_2017-01-01_2017-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-TimebasedRSUsMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">81,000</ix:nonFraction> RSUs, respectively, with service conditions&#xa0;to non-executive employees and non-employee directors. The RSUs generally vest over&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483206">four</span>&#xa0;years for employees and&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483207">one</span>&#xa0;year for directors, subject to continued service&#xa0;with the Company.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>PSUs and MPSUs</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em> PSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> February 2019,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483209" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">151,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to the executive officers, which represent a target number of shares to be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483210">two</span>-year (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2020</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an executive officer can earn is&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483215" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483217" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2021IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2021</em>&#xa0;if the pre-determined performance goals are met during the&#xa0;performance period. The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#xa0;will vest over the following&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em>&#xa0;years on a quarterly basis. Assuming the achievement of the highest level of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483225" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">46.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

     <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"></em>

   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483228" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0">30</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;Shares that do&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;vest will&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;be subject to the purchase price payment. The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs using the Black-Scholes model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483232" contextRef="i_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0">130.67</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;expected term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c56483233" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.6</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483234" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="2" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2">29.0</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;and risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483235" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2">2.5</ix:nonFraction>%.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> October 2018,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted <ix:nonFraction id="c56483236" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">53,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represent a target number of&#xa0;shares to be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2020</em>&#xa0;revenue goals for certain regions or product line divisions, or based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483238">two</span>-year (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2020</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee can earn is either&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483243" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMinimumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">200</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;or&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483244" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs, depending on the job classification of the employee.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483246" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2021IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2021</em>&#xa0;if the pre-determined performance goals are met during the performance period. The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#xa0;will vest over the following&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em>&#xa0;years on an annual or quarterly basis. Assuming the achievement of the highest level of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483253" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">10.9</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483255" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0">30</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;Shares that do&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;vest will&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;be subject to the purchase price payment. The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs using the Black-Scholes model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483259" contextRef="i_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0">108.43</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;expected term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c56483260" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.9</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483261" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2">28.7</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;and risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483262" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2">2.9</ix:nonFraction>%.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> February 2018,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483264" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">188,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to the executive officers, which represent a target number of shares to be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483265">two</span>-year (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an executive officer can earn is&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483270" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483272" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2020IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2020</em>&#xa0;if the pre-determined performance goals are met during the&#xa0;performance period. The maximum number of shares that an employee can earn is either&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483288" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMinimumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">200</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;or&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483289" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs, depending on the job classification of the employee.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483291" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2020IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2020</em>&#xa0;if the pre-determined performance goals are met during the performance period. Assuming the achievement of the highest level of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs, excluding cancelled shares for the terminated employees, is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483300" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">8.8</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs and the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483303" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0">30</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;Shares that do&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;vest will&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;be subject to the purchase price payment. The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs and the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs using the Black-Scholes model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483308" contextRef="i_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0">110.00</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;expected term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c56483309" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.6</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483310" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2">27.5</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;and risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483311" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2">2.3</ix:nonFraction>%.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> PSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> February 2017, </em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted <ix:nonFraction id="c56483313" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">200,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to the executive officers, which represented a target number of shares that would be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s average <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483314">two</span>-year (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2017</em> Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an executive officer could earn was <ix:nonFraction id="c56483319" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">300</ix:nonFraction>% of the target number of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Executive PSUs.&#xa0;In&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> February 2019,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;approved the revenue achievement for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs and a total of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483322" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:TotalPSUEarned" scale="0">521,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;shares were awarded to&#xa0;the executive officers. <ix:nonFraction id="c56483323" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember_VestingAxis-VestedFirstQuarterOf2019Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2">50</ix:nonFraction>% of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Executive PSUs vested in the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> quarter of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019.</em> The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Executive PSUs&#xa0;vest over the following <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em> years on a quarterly basis. Based on the actual achievement of the performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483331" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">31.5</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>

    </div> <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left">&#xa0;</p></ix:exclude>
   <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left"></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> February 2017, </em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted <ix:nonFraction id="c56483333" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">48,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represented a target number of&#xa0;shares that would be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> revenue goals for certain regions or product line divisions, or based on the Company&#x2019;s average <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483335">two</span>-year (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2017</em> Non-Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was either <ix:nonFraction id="c56483340" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMinimumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">200</ix:nonFraction>% or <ix:nonFraction id="c56483341" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">300</ix:nonFraction>% of the target number of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Non-Executive PSUs, depending on the job classification of the employee. In&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> February 2019,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee approved the revenue achievement for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs and a total of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483344" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:TotalPSUEarned" scale="0">101,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;shares were awarded to&#xa0;the employees. <ix:nonFraction id="c56483345" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember_VestingAxis-VestedFirstQuarterOf2019Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2">50</ix:nonFraction>% of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Non-Executive PSUs vested in the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> quarter of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019.</em> The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Non-Executive PSUs&#xa0;vest over the following <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">two</em> years on an annual or quarterly basis. Based on the actual achievement of the performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs, excluding cancelled shares for the terminated employees, is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483353" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">6.1</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>&#xa0;</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Executive PSUs and the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Non-Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483356" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0">30</ix:nonFraction> per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;Shares that do <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> vest will <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> be subject to the purchase price payment. The Company determined the grant date fair value of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Executive PSUs and the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017</em> Non-Executive PSUs using the Black-Scholes model with the following assumptions: stock price of $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483361" contextRef="i_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0">89.37</ix:nonFraction>, expected term of <ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c56483362" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.6</ix:nonNumeric> years, expected volatility of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483363" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2">28.6</ix:nonFraction>% and risk-free interest rate of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483364" contextRef="d_2017-02-01_2017-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSUs2017Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2">1.3</ix:nonFraction>%.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2015</em> MPSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 2015,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483366" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">86,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MPSUs to the executive officers and&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483367" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">41,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MPSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represented a target number of shares that would be earned upon achievement of both market conditions and performance conditions (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2015</em>&#xa0;MPSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483369" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">500</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2015</em>&#xa0;MPSUs. The&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2015</em>&#xa0;MPSUs consisted of&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483372">four</span> separate tranches with various performance periods all ended&#xa0;on&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019.&#xa0;</em>The&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em>&#xa0;tranche contained market conditions only, which required the achievement of&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483374">five</span> stock price targets ranging from&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483375" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheOneMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">71.36</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;to&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483376" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheOneMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">95.57</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;with a performance period from&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2016&#xa0;</em>to&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019.&#xa0;</em></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The second,&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">fourth</em>&#xa0;tranches contained both market and performance conditions. The <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483379">five</span> stock price targets for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">second</em>&#xa0;tranche ranged from&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483381" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheTwoMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">89.56</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;to&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483382" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheTwoMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">106.81</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;with a performance period from&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2017&#xa0;</em>to&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019.&#xa0;</em>The <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">five</em> stock price targets for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">third</em>&#xa0;tranche ranged from&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483385" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheThreeMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">120.80</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;to&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483386" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheThreeMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">135.48</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;with a performance period from&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2018&#xa0;</em>to&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019.&#xa0;</em>The <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">five</em> stock price targets for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">fourth</em>&#xa0;tranche ranged from $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483389" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_VestingAxis-SharebasedCompensationAwardTrancheFourMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">126.08</ix:nonFraction> to $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483390" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_VestingAxis-SharebasedCompensationAwardTrancheFourMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">136.79</ix:nonFraction> with a performance period from&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2019&#xa0;</em>to&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019.</em></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

     <tr style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; background-color: rgb(204, 238, 255);">
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 10%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">Three</p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 2%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 44%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">All stock price targets were achieved as of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> September 30, 2018.</em></p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 2%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 42%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">Operating metric <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">#2</em> was achieved as of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2018.</em></p> </td>
     </tr>
     <tr style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 10%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">Four</p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 2%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 44%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">All stock price targets were achieved as of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> March 31, 2019.</em></p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 2%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p> </td>
      <td style="vertical-align: top; width: 42%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">Operating metric <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">#3</em> was achieved as of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> September 30, 2019.</em></p> </td>
     </tr>
    </tbody>
   </table>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">A total of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483405" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:TotalMSUsEarned" scale="6">0.6</ix:nonFraction> million shares were awarded to&#xa0;the employees. The&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2015</em>&#xa0;MPSUs will vest&#xa0;on&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2020, </em>with post-vesting sales restrictions on the vested shares for up to&#xa0;an additional <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483407">two</span>&#xa0;years.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <ix:exclude><p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"></p>

     <div class="PGNUM" style="text-align: center; width: 100%; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;">
      <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">67</em>

   <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left"></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2015</em> MPSUs, excluding cancelled shares for the terminated employees, is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483415" contextRef="d_2015-01-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">24.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million ($<ix:nonFraction id="c56483416" contextRef="d_2015-01-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheOneMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">8.3</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million for the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit;    <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>MSUs</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> MSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> October 2018,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483425" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">60,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MSUs to the executive officers and&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483426" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">60,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represented a target number of shares that would be earned upon achievement of&#xa0;stock price targets (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2018</em>&#xa0;MSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c56483428" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">500</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;MSUs if the Company achieved <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483430">five</span> stock price targets ranging from $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483431" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">140</ix:nonFraction> to $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483432" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">172</ix:nonFraction> during a performance period from <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> October 26, 2018 </em>to <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2023. </em>As of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em>all stock price targets have been achieved and the employees were awarded&#xa0;a total of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483433" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:TotalMSUsEarned" scale="6">0.6</ix:nonFraction> million shares. The&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em>&#xa0;MSUs will vest on&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2024,&#xa0;</em>with post-vesting sales restrictions on the vested shares for up to&#xa0;an additional <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483435">two</span>&#xa0;years. The total stock-based compensation cost for the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> MSUs, excluding cancelled shares for the terminated employees, is $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483437" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">40.4</ix:nonFraction> million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company determined the grant date fair value of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> MSUs using a Monte Carlo simulation model with the following assumptions: stock price of $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483439" contextRef="i_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0">108.43</ix:nonFraction>, expected volatility of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483440" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2">31.6</ix:nonFraction>%, a risk-free interest rate of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483441" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="2" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2">3.0</ix:nonFraction>%, and an illiquidity discount of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483442" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2018Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsDiscountForPostvestingRestrictions" scale="-2">8.7</ix:nonFraction>% to account for the post-vesting sales restrictions.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2013</em> MSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 2013, </em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted <ix:nonFraction id="c56483444" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">276,000</ix:nonFraction> MSUs to the executive officers and <ix:nonFraction id="c56483445" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0">84,000</ix:nonFraction> MSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represented a target number of shares that would be earned upon achievement of stock price targets (<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">&#x201c;2013</em> MSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was <ix:nonFraction id="c56483447" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2">500</ix:nonFraction>% of the target number of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2013</em> MSUs if the Company achieved <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483449">five</span> price targets ranging from $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483450" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">40</ix:nonFraction> to $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483451" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0">56</ix:nonFraction> during a performance period from <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2014 </em>to <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2018. </em>As of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2015, </em>all stock price targets have been achieved and the employees were awarded&#xa0;a total of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483452" contextRef="d_2015-01-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:TotalMSUsEarned" scale="6">1.8</ix:nonFraction> million shares. The <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2013</em> MSUs vest quarterly from <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> January 1, 2019 </em>to <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2023. </em>The total stock-based compensation cost for the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2013</em> MSUs, excluding cancelled shares for the terminated employees, is $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483455" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6">38.2</ix:nonFraction> million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company determined the grant date fair value of the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2013</em> MSUs using a Monte Carlo simulation model with the following assumptions: stock price of $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483457" contextRef="i_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0">31.73</ix:nonFraction>, expected volatility of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483458" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2">38.7</ix:nonFraction>% and a risk-free interest rate of <ix:nonFraction id="c56483459" contextRef="d_2013-12-01_2013-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MSUs2013Member" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2">1.6</ix:nonFraction>%.&#xa0;There was <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483460">no</span> illiquidity discount because the awards do <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> contain any post-vesting sales restrictions.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>ESPP</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">Under the ESPP, eligible employees <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> may </em>purchase common stock through payroll deductions. Participants <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> may </em><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em> purchase more than <ix:nonFraction id="c56483463" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardMaximumNumberOfSharesPerEmployee" scale="0">2,000</ix:nonFraction> shares in a <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">six</em>-month offering period, or purchase shares having a value greater than $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483465" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardMaximumNumberOfSharesPerEmployeeValue" scale="0">25,000</ix:nonFraction> in any calendar year as measured at the beginning of the offering period in accordance with the Internal Revenue Code and applicable Treasury Regulations.&#xa0;The ESPP provides for an annual increase by an amount equal to the least of <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c56483466">one million</span> shares, <ix:nonFraction id="c56483467" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Pure" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="2" name="mpwr:ShareBasedcompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardOtherThanOptionsPercentIncreasesInPeriod" scale="-2">2</ix:nonFraction>% of the outstanding shares of common stock on the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> day of the year, or a number of shares as determined by the Board of Directors.&#xa0;As of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em><ix:nonFraction id="c56483469" contextRef="i_2019-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardNumberOfSharesAvailableForGrant" scale="6">4.5</ix:nonFraction> million shares were available for future issuance. The ESPP will expire in <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> November 2024.</em></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">For the years ended <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> <ix:nonFraction id="c56483472" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:StockIssuedDuringPeriodSharesEmployeeStockPurchasePlans" scale="0">28,000</ix:nonFraction>, <ix:nonFraction id="c56483473" contextRef="d_2018-01-01_2018-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:StockIssuedDuringPeriodSharesEmployeeStockPurchasePlans" scale="0">33,000</ix:nonFraction> and <ix:nonFraction id="c56483474" contextRef="d_2017-01-01_2017-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF" name="us-gaap:StockIssuedDuringPeriodSharesEmployeeStockPurchasePlans" scale="0">40,000</ix:nonFraction> shares, respectively, were issued. The intrinsic value of the shares issued&#xa0;was $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483475" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:StockIssuedDuringPeriodSharesEmployeeStockPurchasePlansIntrinsicValue" scale="6">0.7</ix:nonFraction> million, $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483476" contextRef="d_2018-01-01_2018-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:StockIssuedDuringPeriodSharesEmployeeStockPurchasePlansIntrinsicValue" scale="6">1.1</ix:nonFraction> million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483477" contextRef="d_2017-01-01_2017-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-6" name="mpwr:StockIssuedDuringPeriodSharesEmployeeStockPurchasePlansIntrinsicValue" scale="6">1.0</ix:nonFraction> million for the years ended <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018</em> and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2017,</em> respectively. The unamortized expense was $<ix:nonFraction id="c56483480" contextRef="i_2019-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:EmployeeServiceShareBasedCompensationNonvestedAwardsTotalCompensationCostNotYetRecognized" scale="6">0.1</ix:nonFraction> million as of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019, </em>which will be recognized through the <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">first</em> quarter of <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2020.</em> The Black-Scholes model was used to value the employee stock purchase rights with the following weighted-average assumptions:&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">9.</em> DIVIDENDS AND DIVIDEND EQUIVALENTS</b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>Cash Dividend Program</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company has a dividend program approved by the Board of Directors,&#xa0;pursuant to which the Company intends to pay quarterly cash dividends on its common stock. Based on the Company&#x2019;s historical practice, stockholders of record as of the last business day of the quarter are entitled to receive the quarterly cash dividends when and if declared by the Board of Directors, which are payable to the stockholders in the following month.&#xa0;The Board of Directors declared the following cash dividends (in thousands, except per-share amounts):&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31" name="us-gaap:DividendsDeclaredTableTextBlock" id="c1442988" escape="true">
    <table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="finTable" style="margin-right: 10%; margin-left: 10%; width: 80%; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; text-indent: 0px;">
     <tbody>
      <tr style="vertical-align: bottom;">
       <td style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</td>

       <td colspan="10" style="text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(0, 0, 0);"> <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:center;"><b><b>Year Ended December 31,</b></b></p> </td>
       <td style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; padding-bottom: 1px;">&#xa0;</td>
      </tr>

   <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">As of&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December&#xa0;</em><em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">31,</em>&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2019</em> and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em>&#xa0;accrued dividends totaled&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483637" contextRef="i_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:DividendsPayableCurrent" scale="6">17.4</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million and&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483638" contextRef="i_2018-12-31" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="us-gaap:DividendsPayableCurrent" scale="6">12.8</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, respectively.</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The declaration of any future cash dividends is at the discretion of the Board of Directors and will depend on, among other things, the Company&#x2019;s financial condition, results of operations, capital requirements, business conditions, and other factors that the Board of Directors&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> may&#xa0;</em>deem relevant, as well as a determination that cash dividends are in the best interests of the stockholders.</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>&#xa0;</i></b></p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company anticipates&#xa0;that cash used for future dividend payments will come from its domestic cash, cash generated from ongoing U.S. operations, and&#xa0;cash repatriated from its Bermuda subsidiary. Earnings from other foreign subsidiaries will continue to be indefinitely reinvested.</p>
   <p style="background-color:#FFFFFF;font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;"><b><i>&#xa0;</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><i>Cash Dividend Equivalent Rights</i></b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company's RSUs contain rights to receive cash dividend equivalents, which entitle employees who hold RSUs to the same dividend value per share as holders of common stock. The dividend equivalents are accumulated and paid to the employees when the underlying RSUs vest. Dividend equivalents accumulated on the underlying RSUs are forfeited if the employees do&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;fulfill the requisite service requirement and, as a result,&#xa0;the awards do&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">not</em>&#xa0;vest.&#xa0;As of&#xa0;<em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;"> December 31, 2019 </em>and <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">2018,</em>&#xa0;accrued dividend equivalents totaled&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483642" contextRef="i_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:AccruedDividendEquivalents" scale="6">10.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million and&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c56483643" contextRef="i_2018-12-31" unitRef="USD" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5" name="mpwr:AccruedDividendEquivalents" scale="6">8.4</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, respectively.&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  </ix:nonNumeric>
  <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

      </tr>
      <tr style="vertical-align: bottom; background-color: rgb(204, 238, 255);">
       <td style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"> <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">Net deferred tax assets</p> </td>
       <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</td>

   <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p><ix:exclude><p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"></p>

    <div class="PGNUM" style="text-align: center; width: 100%; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;">
     <em style="font-weight: inherit; font-style: normal;">71</em>

    <hr style="PAGE-BREAK-AFTER: always; border: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000" />
